import io
import string
import list

fn is_digit(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b >= 48 and b <= 57
end

fn is_ws(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
end

fn parse_ints(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  let n = string.len(s)
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    mut skipping = true
    while skipping
      if i >= n
        skipping = false
      else
        match string.byte_at(s, i)
        when Some(b)
          if is_ws(b)
            i = i + 1
          else
            skipping = false
          end
        when None
          skipping = false
        end
      end
    end
    if i < n
      mut sign = 1
      match string.byte_at(s, i)
      when Some(b)
        if b == 45
          sign = -1
          i = i + 1
        else if b == 43
          i = i + 1
        end
      when None
        ()
      end
      mut num = 0
      mut reading = true
      while reading
        if i >= n
          reading = false
        else
          match string.byte_at(s, i)
          when Some(b)
            if is_digit(b)
              num = num * 10 + (b - 48)
              i = i + 1
            else
              reading = false
            end
          when None
            reading = false
          end
        end
      end
      result = list.push(result, num * sign)
    end
  end
  result
end

fn bsearch(_ xs: List<Int>, _ t: Int) -> Option<Int>
  mut lo = 0
  mut hi = xs.len() - 1
  mut found: Option<Int> = None
  mut done = false
  while not done and lo <= hi
    let mid = (lo + hi) / 2
    match xs.get(mid)
    when Some(v)
      if v == t
        found = Some(mid)
        done = true
      else if v < t
        lo = mid + 1
      else
        hi = mid - 1
      end
    when None
      done = true
    end
  end
  found
end

match io.read_line()
when Some(line1)
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(line2)
    let xs = parse_ints(line1)
    let target_str = string.trim(line2)
    match string.parse_int(target_str)
    when Some(t)
      match bsearch(xs, t)
      when Some(i)
        print("index=#{i}")
      when None
        print("not_found")
      end
    when None
      print("not_found")
    end
  when None
    print("not_found")
  end
when None
  print("not_found")
end
